moments.author: Luguentz Dort
moments.why: Fans mourning the emotional send‑off of one of the Thunder’s defining defenders after his trade.
moments.url: NBC Sports article confirming the three‑team trade of Lu Dort; his farewell post is widely quoted

moments.author: Miles McBride
moments.quote: Final is over…ight Bron it’s your time
moments.why: A cryptic, fan‑fueled message to LeBron as he nears a free‑agency decision sent Knicks Twitter into a frenzy.
moments.url: Yahoo Sports coverage quoting his post “Final is over…ight Bron it’s your time”

moments.author: SportsCenter
moments.quote: Which players could be traded ahead of the MLB trade deadline? 👀
moments.why: Timely buzz as fans focus shifting baseball trade chatter and speculation heats up ahead of deadline.
moments.url: SportsCenter’s tweet about MLB trade‑deadline candidates, gaining massive engagement

moments.author: Jon Heyman / Bob Nightengale (insiders)
moments.quote: Yankees ‘love the idea of adding Mason Miller’
moments.why: Potential high‑leverage bullpen move by a marquee franchise got trade‑deadline talk hammering.
moments.url: MLB.com report citing Yankees interest in Mason Miller

moments.author: Colorado Rockies / Dodgers (via report)
moments.quote: Dodgers acquire reliever Seth Halvorsen from Rockies
